title: More Wolves
body:
Extra Wolf Variations 🐺💖

This is mob variation texture pack for Wolves <3

Each Wolf type now has more variations to randomly spawn~

Minecraft wolves have 9 types, like snowy, striped, spotted, and more.
This pack adds extra textures for each wolf type, so they can spawn in different looks.

Most wolves now have 3 variations each (snowy and pale have 2).
The snowy wolf also has a special cherry blossom style! 🌸

Enjoy!
